name_en: IVY Handbag. Minimalist lines, urban style, and premium leather define this new IVY handbag. Exquisite design with letter logo, showcasing classic style. Removable and adjustable shoulder strap, gold hardware. Front letter logo, fabric lining, with double zip pockets.
name_cn:
IVY Handbag. Minimalist lines, urban style, and premium leather define this new IVY handbag. Exquisite design with letter logo, showcasing classic style. Removable and adjustable shoulder strap, gold hardware. Front letter logo, fabric lining, with double zip pockets.
Model: 5BA288
Size: 22*12*23.5cm
